mapper.select: select id, name, logo_url, summary, category_type, created_at, from p_agency where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into p_agency (id, name, logo_url, category_type, summary, created_at) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{summary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update:
update p_agency
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logo_url = #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
category_type = #{categoryType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
summary = #{summary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update p_agency set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logo_url = #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_type = #{categoryType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, summary = #{summary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
